service_list.name: Residential Metal Roofing
service_list.brief: The Handy Roofer offers residential metal roofing services across Greater Brisbane, including Redlands, Brisbane, Logan, and Ipswich.

service_list.name: Residential Metal Roof Replacements
service_list.brief: They specialise in high-quality metal roof replacements to protect homes with durable roofing.

service_list.name: Metal Roof Repairs
service_list.brief: They provide metal roof repairs as part of their residential and commercial roofing services.

service_list.name: Wall Cladding
service_list.brief: They provide wall cladding services for residential and commercial metal roofing projects.

service_list.name: Fascia and Gutters
service_list.brief: They provide fascia and gutter services alongside roof replacements, repairs, and cladding.

service_list.name: Commercial Metal Roofing
service_list.brief: They deliver large and small commercial metal roofing projects for businesses, schools, churches, and builders.

service_list.name: Heritage Roof Replacements
service_list.brief: They specialise in heritage roof replacements and preserving architectural integrity on heritage properties.

service_list.name: Decramastic to Colorbond Steel Roof Conversion
service_list.brief: They describe the benefits and process of converting decramastic roofs to Colorbond Steel roofing.

service_list.name: Concrete Tile to Colorbond Metal Roof Conversion
service_list.brief: They guide homeowners through replacing concrete tile roofs with Colorbond metal roofs.

key_messaging: Take the Trouble Out of Replacing Your Metal Roof with The Handy Roofer!
Residential & Commercial Roof Services For Over 20 Years

improved_hero_copy.h1: Metal Roof Replacements Across Greater Brisbane
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Licensed QBCC metal roofing specialists delivering durable Colorbond, heritage, residential, and commercial roofing with a 10 year workmanship warranty.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Take the Trouble Out of Replacing Your Metal Roof
improved_hero_copy.subhead: From inspection to installation, The Handy Roofer makes roof replacement clear, compliant, and built for Queensland conditions.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Experienced Metal Roofers for Homes and Commercial Sites
improved_hero_copy.subhead: Serving Brisbane, Logan, Redlands, Ipswich, and surrounding suburbs with quality workmanship, trusted suppliers, and practical roofing advice.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Residential Metal Roofing
improved_service_descriptions.description: Protect your home with a durable metal roofing system designed for Queensland weather, installed by an experienced local team.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Residential Metal Roof Replacements
improved_service_descriptions.description: Replace an ageing or damaged roof with a new metal roof that improves protection, appearance, and long-term reliability.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Metal Roof Repairs
improved_service_descriptions.description: Fix leaks, damaged sheets, sealant issues, and roof wear before small problems become costly structural damage.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Wall Cladding
improved_service_descriptions.description: Add durable metal cladding that protects exterior surfaces while creating a clean, modern finish.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Fascia and Gutters
improved_service_descriptions.description: Complete the roofline with fascia and gutter work that helps move water away from the home and protect the structure.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Commercial Metal Roofing
improved_service_descriptions.description: Deliver compliant, reliable metal roofing for businesses, schools, churches, builders, and commercial properties of varying scale.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Heritage Roof Replacements
improved_service_descriptions.description: Preserve the character of heritage properties while replacing roofing with careful material selection and experienced workmanship.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Decramastic to Colorbond Steel Roof Conversion
improved_service_descriptions.description: Upgrade fragile decramastic roofing to Colorbond Steel for stronger weather protection, lower maintenance, and a refreshed home exterior.

improved_service_descriptions.name: Concrete Tile to Colorbond Metal Roof Conversion
improved_service_descriptions.description: Convert heavy concrete tiles to Colorbond metal roofing with a structured process covering inspection, safety, approvals, and installation.

meta_descriptions.description: The Handy Roofer provides licensed metal roof replacements, repairs, cladding, fascia, gutters, and commercial roofing across Greater Brisbane.
Meet The Handy Roofer, a QBCC licensed Greater Brisbane metal roofing company focused on integrity, quality workmanship, and customer service.
Meet Jeremy, Megan, Mark, and The Handy Roofer team delivering residential and commercial metal roofing across Brisbane, Logan, Redlands, and Ipswich.
Read metal roofing advice from The Handy Roofer, including roof replacement, Colorbond, Zincalume, tile conversion, heritage roofs, and QBCC insurance.

trust_signals_to_emphasize: Colorbond, BlueScope Steel, and Lysaght supplier associations
Reno Now, Pay Later using HandyPay
Experience with commercial businesses, schools, churches, and builders

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the strong local positioning, QBCC licence, 20+ years experience, workmanship warranty, supplier trust marks, real team story, and clear focus on metal roof replacements. Improve the site by making the service structure clearer, elevating conversion and heritage roof specialties, using stronger roof project imagery, tightening CTAs around free quotes and inspections, and reducing duplicated or low-clarity navigation labels. The redesign matters because roof replacement is a high-trust, high-value purchase, and the current Wix site has credible proof but needs a more polished, conversion-focused presentation to help homeowners, builders, and commercial clients quickly understand why The Handy Roofer is the right choice.
